utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 required items in the format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Fully specified according to the format: destination (yes), travel_dates (yes), transportation (arguably yes on cost, but minimal details—still counts), accommodation (yes with cost), activities (no costs—does not meet requirement), additional_services (costs not clearly specified—'Complimentary' lacks numeric cost; partial), total_budget (not a breakdown—just a total number; requirement says complete cost breakdown—missing). Therefore, fully specified items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation = 4. Items not fully specified: activities, additional_services, total_budget = 3. Total items = 7. Included fully = 4.
